historical_dictionary_entries.source_title: American Dictionary of the English Language
historical_dictionary_entries.sense_summary: Hub as the nave of a wheel, a timber piece receiving spokes.
historical_dictionary_entries.notes: Dated dictionary entry; not a first-use quotation.

historical_dictionary_entries.sense_summary: Hub as central wheel part, nave, plus other technical/regional senses.
historical_dictionary_entries.evidence_text_short: The central part ... of a wheel; the nave.
historical_dictionary_entries.notes: Public-domain dictionary confirms sense structure; not an earliest-use quotation.
